article_title: Sales in a manufacturer picnic area

briefs.title: BC Liquor Manufacturers Can Now Sell Drinks by the Glass in Picnic Areas
briefs.summary: BC updated its liquor rules to allow manufacturers (like wineries, breweries, and distilleries) to sell and serve their own products by the glass in a designated outdoor picnic sale area — not just let customers bring their own drinks to drink there. The total size of all areas under a picnic area endorsement (a licence add-on for outdoor spaces) cannot exceed 1,000 square metres.
briefs.action_required: Apply via the BC liquor and cannabis licensing portal — to convert a TESA to permanent, or to add a sale area to an existing picnic endorsement.
briefs.article_title: Sales in a manufacturer picnic area
